productDisplayName: Maxima Men White Dial Attivo Watch
description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make an exclusive style statement with this Attivo watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to class-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Square stainless steel case in black Dial style: Round white dial with silver indicies and black and blue hands Features: Date aperture at 3 hour mark Strap stype: Black rubber strap with tang clasp Water resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashes Warranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 43 mm Case thickness: 10 mm
